summary.intent: Address and resolve PR review comments on PR #627, likely related to documentation fixes.
summary.outcome: Updated docs/src/hooks.md (likely fixing a SHA or version reference for v0.4.0 of dcg) and committed/pushed the change to the PR branch.

repo: The project uses worktrees under ~/.superset/worktrees/ for managing multiple branches (e.g., moltis/fortuna/patch-1)
PR #627 was authored by 'fortuna' and involved documentation in docs/src/hooks.md
The dcg tool has a versioned install.sh with a SHA that must be referenced correctly in docs (v0.4.0)

code.finding: Contains install instructions referencing dcg v0.4.0 install.sh; the SHA256 hash needed to be corrected based on the actual release artifact

workflow: Used gh CLI to list and inspect PR review comments to drive the fix
Had to fetch the correct SHA256 for install.sh at a specific git tag from the dcg releases

friction: SHA lookup required multiple attempts (three separate bash calls to get install.sh SHA for v0.4.0), suggesting the correct method wasn't immediately obvious
